message:
feat(mux): add desktop notification support via OSC 9

- Add panel_notification binary message type (0x0D)
- Handle GHOSTTY_ACTION_DESKTOP_NOTIFICATION in action callback
- Broadcast notifications to web clients with title and body
- Show browser Notification API popup when permission granted
- Add visual indicator on background tabs for notifications
- Click notification to focus window and switch to source panel
- Auto-close notifications after 5 seconds

Also includes compression level optimization for frame encoding.
